nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 黑纹穗鹛
nodes.summary: 黑纹穗鹛（Negros striped babbler，学名 Zosterornis nigrorum），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest in the range of 900–1,600 masl. It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest in the range of 900–1,600 masl. It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: IUCN has assessed this bird as Endangered. This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
